title: [HW] Add HWModuleGraph and printer
body:
Motivation: I have a fairly small threshold for the amount of RTL IR i can parse while reasoning about the overall structure of the hardware.
This commit adds support for printing the body of a `hw::HWModuleOp` as a `.dot` graph. This should be useful for developers and users alike :).

This represents a basic implementation of the idea, and can easily be improved,  E.g.
* the graph does not yet show  module inputs. 
* the graph can be structured "better" by having separate groups for input, inner, and output nodes, and ensuring ordering between these.
* Edge attributes indicating signal type (bold lines for >1 bit wide signals)
* SSA value names on edges

... future work!

Q: Introduces a dependency on Seq/Comb in HW - should this be moved to `Support`?
